pr-evidence/validate-report-quality-rate.gpt55_review_summary: GPT-5.5 initially found a test-strength gap, then approved after row-specific assertions independently covered the bool rate case.
what_changed: Validated strict V1 report-row quality rates when present.
Added release-evidence regression coverage for malformed exact_match_rate and answer_found_rate values.
pr-evidence/validate-report-quality-rate.why: Strict V1 release evidence should reject malformed quality-rate summaries used to compare cache reuse against no-cache prefill.
